title: cousinia eriophylla
intro: Cousinia eriophylla, also known as the Woolly Cousinia, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cousinia eriophylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Cousinia eriophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
